test_suite: Operations Hub - Full Reconciliation Diagnostics v2

scenarios.name: Generic Availability Complaint (Inventory + Price Both Down)
scenarios.description: GENERIC intent — agent must use checkWebDatabase + reason array to triage. Both systems need fixing.
scenarios.input: Why is prod000 not showing on the site? It should have been live since this morning.
scenarios.ground_truth: Product prod000 was NOT_SELLABLE due to webInventory=0 and webPrice=$0. Upstream inventory confirmed 150 units and price $24.99. Triggered separate syncs for inventory and pricing. Product is now SELLABLE.

scenarios.name: Specific Price Complaint on SELLABLE Product
scenarios.description: SPECIFIC intent — user says price is wrong. Product IS online but price is stale. Agent must NOT exit early on SELLABLE.
scenarios.input: I think the price is wrong for prod666. It looks off compared to what we set.
scenarios.ground_truth: Product prod666 is SELLABLE but a price discrepancy was found. Upstream price differs from web price. Triggered a price sync. Web price has been updated and verified.

scenarios.name: Episodic Memory Fast-Path (SKU 1029)
scenarios.description: Agent recalls SKU 1029 was recently fixed — should skip diagnosis and go straight to sync then verify.
scenarios.input: Can you check on SKU 1029 again please.
scenarios.ground_truth: Episodic memory indicates SKU 1029 was recently fixed. Triggered inventory sync immediately and confirmed the product is SELLABLE.

scenarios.name: PIM Metadata Complaint (Wrong Product Name)
scenarios.description: SPECIFIC intent — user flags a metadata issue. Agent must call checkPimService and sync pim.
scenarios.input: The product name for prod_9982 looks completely wrong on the site. Can you fix it?
scenarios.ground_truth: A PIM metadata discrepancy was found for prod_9982. The upstream product name differs from what is displayed on the web. Triggered a PIM sync and verified the product metadata is now correct.

scenarios.name: Full Reconciliation — All Systems Down
scenarios.description: GENERIC intent — checkWebDatabase returns reason array with inventory, price, and metadata issues. Agent must call all upstream systems and fix all.
scenarios.input: Product prod_9982 is completely broken on the site — not visible at all.
scenarios.ground_truth: Product prod_9982 was NOT_SELLABLE due to inventory, price, and metadata issues. All three upstream systems were queried and discrepancies confirmed. Separate syncs triggered for inventory, price, and PIM. Product is now SELLABLE.

scenarios.name: DLQ Recovery — Sync Failure + Guide Consultation
scenarios.description: Tests the error handling path. A previous sync crashed (DLQ entry exists). Agent must find it, consult the guide, and then sync successfully.
scenarios.input: Why is prod_dlq not showing on the site? We pushed it yesterday.
scenarios.ground_truth: Product prod_dlq was NOT_SELLABLE due to a previous failed sync job found in the Dead Letter Queue with a ConsumerDatabaseTimeoutException. The troubleshooting guide confirmed this is a transient DB lock issue. An autonomous sync was triggered and the product is now SELLABLE.

scenarios.name: L2 Detective Handoff — Systemic Infrastructure Failure
scenarios.description: Tests escalation to L2 Detective. Sync fails three times for prod_l2 (mocked). Agent must call delegateToL2Detective to find the root cause.
scenarios.input: I keep trying to fix prod_l2 but it stays broken. Can you do a deep dive?
scenarios.ground_truth: Standard sync failed three times for prod_l2 due to persistent database locks. Escalated to L2 Detective, which identified DynamoDB write throttling as the root cause. Informing the user of the infrastructure-level bottleneck.

scenarios.name: Gift Item Validation — Expected Zero Price
scenarios.description: Special case pricing. Product is a GIFT item with $0 price. Agent must NOT interpret this as a discrepancy or trigger a sync.
scenarios.input: Why is GFT-404 listed as $0.00? Is it broken?
scenarios.ground_truth: Product GFT-404 is checked and its price is $0.00. Recognized as a valid promotional gift item. No pricing discrepancy found, so no sync was triggered. Informing the user the price is correct by design.

scenarios.name: Transient Error & Silent Recovery
scenarios.description: Tests the automatic retry hook logic. An upstream system throws a 503 error initially but succeeds on retry. AI should not see the error.
scenarios.ground_truth: Encountered a transient 503 network error during inventory sync for prod777. The orchestrator silently retried the operation which succeeded. Product is verified as SELLABLE.
